global_summary: Company-wide, 29 of 174 tasks done and pace is behind, gap 22 points. Karim and Martha carry the biggest August spillover; Ginger Brown and Clifford Clack need painting and glass this week. Most projects are savable if this week's targets land.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Fireplace and doors fixed, but only 2 of 21 expected work-days done. Start painting by Sat Jul 18; slip 91%.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: Flooring and secret door built, but only 4 of 14 expected work-days done. Install glass by Tue Jul 14; slip 71%.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: Slip: 14% of the month plan (15.0 of 24.0 expected work-days done; 3/29 tasks). To recover: finish DECKING: INSTALL DECKING by Sat Jul 18.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: Foundation dug and in-ground plumbing done; 11 of 17 expected work-days done. Pour concrete by Wed Jul 15; slip 18%.

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: Sheetrock taped, textured and inspected; 12 of 25 expected work-days done. Install plumbing trim by Sat Jul 18; slip 27%.

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: Interior paint done; 32 of 40 expected work-days done. Install electrical and mechanical trim by Thu Jul 16; slip 15%.

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: Slip: 20% of the month plan (57.0 of 77.0 expected work-days done; 6/23 tasks). To recover: finish ROOFING: EXECUTE by Thu Jul 16.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Framing and sheathing done; 14 of 21 expected work-days done. Finish plumbing rough-in by Sun Jul 19; slip 11%.

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: Sheetrock hung and plumbing inspection passed; 11 of 13 expected work-days done. Tape and texture drywall by Thu Jul 16; slip 5%.
